title: CellChatAccelRcpp: 64-bit sparse-stream Rcpp acceleration of CellChat inference for large single-cell communication analyses

creators.name: Deng, Zifeng
creators.affiliation: Hainan Bielefeld University of Applied Sciences

description: CellChatAccelRcpp is a 64-bit sparse_stream R/Rcpp acceleration layer for large-scale CellChat RNA workflows. It preserves the standard CellChat object interface while replacing selected computational bottlenecks with compiled implementations for communication probability estimation, pathway aggregation, network aggregation and group-level expression summaries.
